narrative:
95 Ohio House district has 66,717 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.4%, a modest Republican lean of 5.4 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -2.5% D−R vs -7.7% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
